method: 5-year yfinance daily log-returns; scipy.stats.skew(bias=False) + scipy.stats.kurtosis(fisher=True, bias=False); Maillard 2012 caps S in [-1.5, 1.5], K_excess in [0, 15]; pooled per category

altcoin_spot.note: Maillard cap clamping fired — empirical realized moments for the 16 altcoin spot ETFs exceed monotone-domain bounds

btc_futures.rationale: BTC futures track BTC spot tightly with contango drag layered on top — moment shape is dominated by underlying BTC distribution

eth_futures.rationale: ETH futures follow ETH spot underlying

leveraged.rationale: Most leveraged crypto ETFs are BTC-linked (BITX, BITU, BTCL); 2x daily reset preserves moment shape

income_covered_call.rationale: Covered-call wrappers (BTCI, BMAX, IBIY, YBTC) on BTC underlier; option overlay reshapes return distribution but skew direction follows underlying

multi_asset.rationale: 60% BTC + 40% ETH weight aggregate of fitted moments — matches Bitwise BITW / Hashdex DEFI typical weighting

thematic_equity.rationale: Crypto-industry equities (BLOK, DAPP, BKCH) co-move with the BTC/ETH blend at ~0.55-0.85 correlation; moment shape matches multi-asset

defined_outcome.rationale: Calamos buffer ETFs (CBOJ-series) decouple from BTC on drawdowns by design; we use multi_asset moments as the conservative substitute (stricter VaR than pure BTC).

deprecated_constants.reason: Cowork no-fallback directive — production-config replaces hardcoded crypto-midpoint defaults. Any reference to (-0.7, 8.0) elsewhere in the codebase is a regression.
